title: lonchocarpus huetamoensis subsp. xochipalensis
intro: Lonchocarpus huetamoensis subsp. xochipalensis, a plant species within the Fabaceae family, is a sub-species of Lonchocarpus huetamoensis that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. This plant contains various bioactive compounds, including alkaloids, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which have been reported to possess anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Lonchocarpus huetamoensis subsp. xochipalensis include its potential to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its use in wound healing and as an antiseptic. In traditional herbal medicine, this plant is typically prepared as a decoction or infusion, and it may also be used in the form of a tincture or topical cream to harness its medicinal properties.
